text.message: it's not really a nb situation

you want some of my wood red?
we gotta work together to catch up
bro you two have been dominating
oh have i? sick, okay ignore me then :)

it's funny how everyone has better production than me
now it won't be easy to do anything lol
it's actually wild how much those monos influenced the game
your position seemed pretty bad before that
i haven't yet, which is bad
someone could grab it too easily right now
so my winning chances are gone
we gotta keep black you he loses army, pretty much. a few good rolls and you drop your last city
i put it there because i wanted to make red play a knight
i think the 5 is a good spot for now
but you gotta keep a close eye on red
lmao man i have no chance!
rooting for anyone but blue now

it would be nice if you have rb oj
need cards to cut him tho

needed cards, threw out the trade
